code: import{format}from'date-fns';import SearchColumn from'./SearchColumn';export var COLUMNS=[{Header:'ID',Footer:'ID',accessor:'id',disableFilters:true},{Header:'Student ID',Footer:'Student ID',accessor:'studentID'},{Header:'Name',Footer:'Name',accessor:'name'},{Header:'Password',Footer:'Password',accessor:'password'},{Header:'Date Created',Footer:'Date Created',accessor:'dateCreated',Cell:function Cell(_ref){var value=_ref.value;return format(new Date(value),'dd/MM/yyyy');}}];
